evals.prompt: Open question I want to keep visible: should auto-memorise be on by default in every project, or opt-in via .vestige/config.toml? Real ambiguity — I can see arguments either way and don't want to decide right now. Park it.
evals.expected_output: vestige question add with body framed as an actual question about auto-memorise default, importance ~0.5-0.6.

evals.prompt: TBD: do we ship a `vestige init --install-skills` flag in v0.3 or wait for v0.5 when we have the MCP server in place? Capture as a question — needs more thought.
evals.expected_output: vestige question add capturing the install-skills timing question.

evals.prompt: follow-up I don't want to lose: when we add hybrid recall, should the score normalisation be min-max per query or rank-based? Need to investigate the literature first. record it.
evals.expected_output: vestige question add about hybrid recall score normalisation, importance ~0.5.
